title: Wire agentic-store, agentic-embed, agentic-voice, agentic-sense as external packages
description: Replace local stubs with external package wrappers: agentic-store replaces src/store/index.js, agentic-embed replaces src/runtime/embed.js, confirm agentic-voice wraps stt.js/tts.js, confirm agentic-sense wraps runtime/sense.js.
